name: Gabriel
subtitle: Full Correspondences
summary: Gabriel trumpet of annunciation — a seed of word entering time.
flowText: Gabriel trumpet of annunciation — a seed of word entering time.

related.name: Zephyrus
related.teaser: Heart is the vesica of the world — the overlap where differences become devotion.

related.name: XVII. The Star
related.teaser: The Star is the light of renewal — a cosmic beacon, pouring hope into the waters of the soul.

related.name: XX. Judgment
related.teaser: Judgment is the trumpet of resurrection — the call of spirit that awakens the dead into light.

related.name: ☽ Moon
related.teaser: The Moon is the tide of psyche — dream mirror, womb of waters, keeper of illusion.

related.name: ♇ Pluto
related.teaser: Pluto is the black sun — furnace of death, seed of rebirth, fire of shadows.

related.name: ♋ Cancer
related.teaser: Cancer is the lunar tide — mother’s embrace, ocean of feeling, mirror of psyche.

related.name: Clear Quartz
related.teaser: Crown is the open sky—pure presence pervading all forms.

related.name: Four of Cups
related.teaser: Four of Cups is the cup of water — Structure and rest; beware stagnation.

related.name: Page of Cups
related.teaser: Page of Cups is the cup of water — Beginner’s mind; bring news and curiosity.

related.name: Queen of Cups
related.teaser: Queen of Cups is the cup of water — Contain and cultivate; depth with discernment.

related.name: Knight of Cups
related.teaser: Knight of Cups is the cup of water — Drive and journey; steer the force wisely.
